ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's residential address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient undergoing the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was administered */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration in minutes the test took to complete */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Name of the tester who administered the test */,
  "test_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the test used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the test was administered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the test session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_test_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_version_id") REFERENCES test_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific test administered */,
  "score" REAL /* Score or measurement obtained from the test */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation or analysis of the test score */,
  "test_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the test used */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_version_id") REFERENCES test_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "valid_values" TEXT /* Valid values or range of the test scores */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the data field as originally recorded */,
  "new_name" TEXT /* New name for the data field if renamed */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the data field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data field */,
  "export" TEXT /* Indication if the field is exported */,
  "valid_values" TEXT /* Valid values for the data field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department to which the administrator belongs */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_administrators_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the export */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was exported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the exported file in MB */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported file */,
  "export_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the export */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the import */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was imported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the imported file in MB */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported file */,
  "import_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the import */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medical test */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "released_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who released the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or management plan */,
  "physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who diagnosed the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
